description: Vice Admiral Priyantha Perera, Commander, Sri Lanka Navy. Vs A. A. M. R. Ali, before Hon. Dr. Sumudu Premachandra J.
parties: Vice Admiral Priyantha Perera, Commander, Sri Lanka Navy. Vs A. A. M. R. Ali,
keywords: Information sought is threat to national security and threats to sovereignty. Oakes Test, The Johannesburg Principles, What is a "real or identifiable prejudice" to national security Article 14A of the Constitution, Section 34 of the Right to Information Act No. 12 of 2016, 5(1)(b)(i) of the Right to Information Act No. 12 of 2016, Official Secrets Act No. 32 of 1955, section 4 of the RTI Act, Article 19 of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights, Article 19 of the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR), The Johannesburg Principles on National Security, Freedom of Expression and Access to Information, U.N.
